feed.title: Sociolinguistica - European Journal of Sociolinguistics
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Sociolinguistica - European Journal of Sociolinguistics (De Gruyter)

entry.title: The role of social networks in language maintenance among Bangladeshi migrants in Southeast Queensland, Australia
entry.summary: Authors: Farzana Yesmen Chowdhury DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/soci-2024-0039 Pages: Page range: 1-25

entry.title: Language biographical schemas, response modalities and L2-strategies: a sociolinguistic approach to language biographies
entry.summary: Authors: Johanna Holzer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/soci-2023-0028 Pages: Page range: 27-52

entry.title: Language and civic education requirements as gatekeepers or tools for economic integration: a question of gender?
entry.summary: Authors: Philip Rehnberg, Fanny Forsberg Lundell DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/soci-2025-0010 Pages: Page range: 53-85

entry.title: Building authority through linguistic purism in digital media: the rise of a Catalan language influencer
entry.summary: Authors: Helena Borrell Carreras DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/soci-2025-0033 Pages: Page range: 86-108

entry.title: Linguistic identities and language ideologies in German heritage communities
entry.summary: Authors: Claudia Maria Riehl DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/soci-2025-0024 Pages: Page range: 109-135

entry.title: Understanding language ideologies and shift in an assimilationist regime: a study among Circassians in Türkiye
entry.summary: Authors: Yasemin Oral-Saribaş DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/soci-2025-0039 Pages: Page range: 136-160

entry.title: Obituary: Louis-Jean Calvet (1942–2025)
